favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Use ⌘K to search and click the star to add tools here.

changelogPage.title: Changelog
changelogPage.description: Track new additions and refinements by date, with the affected menu names listed under each update.
changelogPage.summary: From now on, each new tool, page refinement, or wiring fix can be appended here and the page will stay organized by date automatically.

home.welcomeSubtitle: An online platform with many practical tools, always growing.
home.feature1Desc: Built with modern front-end stack, responsive and smooth.
home.feature2Desc: New tools added regularly, more features over time.
home.feature3Desc: Works on desktop and mobile, use anytime.

toolDesc.qrcode_generate: Generate custom QR codes with logo, colors, and size options
toolDesc.qrcode_read: Upload or scan QR codes to decode content
toolDesc.qrcode_beautifier: Customize QR style, colors, and add logo
toolDesc.news: Tech, sports, AI, world news and more, updated daily
toolDesc.zipcode: Look up zip code by address or address by zip code
toolDesc.weather: Default to IP-based location lookup and support last 7 days, last 30 days, and custom weather ranges
toolDesc.github_info: Enter a GitHub token to read the authenticated user profile and accessible repositories without persisting the token
toolDesc.ip_query: IP location, ISP, timezone, with map preview
toolDesc.ip_asn: Look up AS number, network owner, and ISP details for an IP
toolDesc.dns_query: Look up A, AAAA, MX, TXT, CNAME, NS, SOA and more via DoH
toolDesc.dns_trace: Trace recursive DNS resolution hops and inspect delegation flow
toolDesc.dns_propagation: Compare public resolvers to understand whether a DNS record has propagated
toolDesc.dns_global_check: Query DNS from multiple geographic regions in parallel to find regional discrepancies
toolDesc.dns_performance: Benchmark public resolvers on response time, success rate, and stability
toolDesc.dns_ttl: Inspect current TTL and remaining cache lifetime to estimate when a record change will take effect
toolDesc.dns_soa: Resolve SOA records — primary NS, email, serial, TTL, and refresh policy
toolDesc.dns_diagnose: Troubleshoot DNS resolution failures (NS delegation, authoritative NX, timeouts, ECS, etc.)
toolDesc.dns_pollution_check: Compare a trusted resolver against suspect ones to detect DNS pollution or poisoning
toolDesc.dns_hijack_check: Compare expected IP against actual resolution to detect mid-path DNS hijacking
toolDesc.dns_cache_check: Observe TTL behavior across repeated queries to see if and how long a resolver caches
toolDesc.dns_loop_check: Detect CNAME-chain self-loops or mutual references that would prevent resolution
toolDesc.dns_ns: Query the NS records of a domain and validate consistency across authoritatives
toolDesc.dns_cname_chain: Visualize the CNAME hop chain, TTL of each hop, and final target
toolDesc.dns_nxdomain: Confirm whether a domain truly returns NXDOMAIN and compare responses across resolvers
toolDesc.dns_latency: Latency benchmark across major public DNS resolvers to find the fastest for you
toolDesc.dns_authoritative: Query and compare records returned by every authoritative NS to spot configuration drift
toolDesc.dns_recursive: Detect whether a resolver is openly recursive — a risk vector for amplification attacks
toolDesc.dns_path_viz: Visualize the full DNS resolution path from root through TLD to authoritative NS
toolDesc.dns_tunnel: Identify probable DNS tunneling abuse using query length, entropy, and frequency signals
toolDesc.security_ip_score: Score a public IP with public reputation, RDAP ownership, and reverse-DNS signals
toolDesc.security_domain_blacklist: Check domain reputation using public DNSBL feeds, age, and mail-auth signals
toolDesc.security_port_scan: Probe common ports from the backend and highlight risky exposed services
toolDesc.security_dns_vuln: Review DNSSEC, SPF, DMARC, CAA, NS redundancy, and wildcard configuration risk
toolDesc.security_report_gen: Aggregate domain, IP, port, and DNS findings into a downloadable security report
toolDesc.ipam_plan: Generate VLSM plans from a parent block and host demand, then save them into local inventory
toolDesc.ipam_inventory: Maintain address-pool inventory and organize CIDR assets by site, purpose, and status
toolDesc.ipam_usage: Analyze utilization, remaining capacity, and high-water risk across inventory pools
toolDesc.ipam_conflict: Detect overlap and containment between multiple CIDRs, optionally including inventory
toolDesc.ipam_allocation_sim: Simulate sequential allocation inside a pool, skip reservations, and measure capacity
toolDesc.json: Format, minify, validate JSON, copy or download
toolDesc.data_masking: Redact phone / ID / email / card / IP / MAC / plate / JWT in bulk text, with custom regex rules
toolDesc.aes_cipher: Native Web Crypto AES-GCM/CBC/CTR, 128/192/256-bit keys, PBKDF2 derivation, fully client-side
toolDesc.hmac_sign: Native Web Crypto HMAC-SHA1/256/384/512 sign & verify with constant-time compare — useful for API / webhook debugging
toolDesc.fake_data_gen: Batch generate name / email / phone / address / company fake data; export as JSON / CSV / SQL Insert / TypeScript
toolDesc.xml_formatter: Pretty-print / minify / validate XML using native DOMParser, with error line locator — all local
toolDesc.md_table_gen: Visual Markdown table editor with CSV/TSV/JSON conversion, column alignment, and live output
toolDesc.format_converter: Convert between JSON, YAML, and XML with live validation and a normalized structure preview
toolDesc.base64: Encode and decode text or images to/from Base64
toolDesc.ascii_art: Turn plain text into ASCII art for terminals, headers, and playful output
toolDesc.timestamp: Convert between timestamp and date/time, seconds or milliseconds
toolDesc.url: Encode and decode URL parameters for APIs and crawlers
toolDesc.regex: Test regex with match highlighting and groups
toolDesc.cron: Visual Cron expression builder for scheduled tasks
toolDesc.password: Generate strong random passwords with custom length and character sets
toolDesc.password_strength: Analyze password strength, entropy, and weak patterns to improve account security
toolDesc.hash: MD5, SHA1, SHA256 and more hash algorithms
toolDesc.code: Format JSON, XML, HTML, CSS, JS and more
toolDesc.uuid: Generate UUIDs and random strings for tests and unique IDs
toolDesc.graphql_builder: Build GraphQL queries, variables, and field selections visually for API debugging
toolDesc.morse_code: Convert between plain text and Morse code for learning and demo scenarios
toolDesc.text_comparator: Compare two texts with char/word/line diff and highlighting
toolDesc.word_count: Count words, characters, lines, and reading time for writing workflows
toolDesc.image_compressor: Compress images, convert format and adjust quality
toolDesc.image_bg_remover: Remove image background to transparent PNG, local processing
toolDesc.markdown: Convert Markdown and HTML with live preview
toolDesc.bmi: Calculate BMI from height and weight with health tips
toolDesc.color_picker: Pick colors, convert formats, generate color schemes
toolDesc.color_blind_sim: Preview common color-vision deficiencies to improve accessibility checks
toolDesc.color_system: Generate tonal palettes, semantic colors, and design tokens for a color system
toolDesc.unit_converter: Length, weight, temperature, area, volume and more, 12 categories
toolDesc.pdf_tools: Merge, split, convert PDFs and more, local processing
toolDesc.sheet_editor: Edit CSV data and Excel-pasted tables online, then filter, convert, and chart them
toolDesc.id_card_parser: Extract structured fields from ID card images for entry and verification workflows
toolDesc.text_to_speech: Turn text into playable speech for reading, proofreading, and accessibility use cases
toolDesc.short_link: Shorten long URLs with custom suffix, expiry and stats
toolDesc.resume: Build a resume with templates, export PDF and Markdown
toolDesc.business_card: 3-template online card designer: live preview, custom palette, vCard QR, PNG/PDF export
toolDesc.meta_tag_gen: One-click SEO + Open Graph + Twitter Card tags with live Google / Twitter / Facebook preview
toolDesc.file_hash_check: Compute MD5 / SHA-1 / SHA-256 / SHA-512 locally, auto-match expected hash, multi-file batch — never uploaded
toolDesc.zip_extractor: Drag in a ZIP to browse its tree, download or preview text / images — parsed by JSZip locally
toolDesc.duplicate_finder: Select multiple files, local SHA-256 hashing groups identical content; mark keep / delete and export a CSV cleanup report
toolDesc.file_splitter: Split a file into parts by byte size or count, or merge parts back; pure-frontend File.slice + Blob
toolDesc.weight_tracker: Daily weight log + SVG trend chart + live BMI + goal progress; fully client-side
toolDesc.holiday_countdown: Built-in Chinese holidays (incl. lunar) + custom birthdays / anniversaries, sorted by days remaining, auto-rolls to next year
toolDesc.trash_classifier: 100+ built-in items: type an item to see its 4-tier category; fuzzy match + random draw + custom entries
toolDesc.item_locator: Record where you put clothes / watches / daily items; category × scenario filters + full-text search + local-only + JSON import/export
toolDesc.matrix_calc: Linear-algebra essentials: add/sub/mul, transpose, determinant, inverse, rank, trace; 2x2 to 10x10
toolDesc.color_generator: Generate color palettes and export for your project
toolDesc.meme_generator: Create memes with text and style, export in one click
toolDesc.copywriting_generator: Generate copy in multiple styles and scenarios
toolDesc.dice_roller: Classic 1–6 pip dice, 1–12 dice, tumble animation, crypto-secure RNG
toolDesc.truth_dare: Party-ready Truth or Dare with 4 difficulty tiers, player rotation and custom prompts — local-only
toolDesc.undercover_game: Single-device party game: random word pairs and secret roles, pass-and-flip reveal, vote out, auto win detection
toolDesc.guess_number: Computer or friend picks a number; binary-style hint, best-score history per range
toolDesc.werewolf: Single-device role dealer: configurable classic roles, pass-and-flip secret reveal — for in-person play
toolDesc.wooden_fish: Tap the wooden fish, relax and de-stress, auto mode supported
toolDesc.life_progress: Visualize life progress and time to plan ahead
toolDesc.analog_clock: Beautiful analog clock with 10 themes and fullscreen support
toolDesc.currency_history: Review exchange-rate history and interval changes to support conversion timing
toolDesc.expiry_reminder: Track food, documents, and subscriptions before they expire
toolDesc.family_tasks: Coordinate family chores and shared to-dos with a lightweight task board
toolDesc.fridge_inventory: Track fridge ingredients, shelf life, and usage to reduce waste
toolDesc.investment_sim: Model recurring investment, compounding, and return curves over time
toolDesc.loan_calc: Calculate payments, total interest, and repayment plans for loan scenarios
toolDesc.pomodoro_pro: A more advanced Pomodoro workflow with richer pacing and session control
toolDesc.meeting_minutes: Bring in media or transcript files, refine the transcript, and extract summary, decisions, and action items
toolDesc.ui_generator: Turn text prompts and sketch ratios into UI wireframes plus a React/Tailwind starter
toolDesc.graphql_playground: Test GraphQL queries, variables, and schema introspection in one place
toolDesc.postman_lite: Send lightweight HTTP requests and inspect headers, params, and responses
toolDesc.rapid_tables: Use common calculators and converters for quick development and daily tasks
toolDesc.text_cipher: Encrypt, decrypt, and transform text for testing and demonstration scenarios
toolDesc.text_stats: Count words, characters, lines, and reading time for content analysis
toolDesc.github_repo: Inspect repository metadata, activity, and key GitHub signals
toolDesc.github_user: Inspect GitHub profile data and public contribution signals
toolDesc.timezone_converter: Compare current times across cities and convert a meeting time into each selected timezone
toolDesc.ai_token_cost: Estimate LLM usage cost from per-model token pricing with multi-model comparison
toolDesc.proxy_speed_test: Batch-test HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS5 proxies for latency and throughput

colorPicker.title: Color Picker / Palette
colorPicker.subtitle: Pick colors, convert formats, generate color schemes
colorPicker.paletteEmpty: Palette is empty. Click "Add to palette" to add colors.
colorPicker.tip1: Click the color preview to open the system color picker.
colorPicker.tip2: Click "Pick from screen" to sample any color (Chrome/Edge 95+).
colorPicker.tip3: Locked colors are kept when regenerating the palette.
colorPicker.tip4: Export as CSS, SCSS, Tailwind config, or JSON.
colorPicker.eyedropperUnsupported: Eye dropper is not supported. Please use Chrome or Edge 95+.

toolTimezoneConverter.title: Timezone Converter
toolTimezoneConverter.description: Compare current times across cities and convert a meeting time into each selected timezone.
toolTimezoneConverter.currentTimeDescription: See multiple cities at once and spot the best collaboration window quickly.
toolTimezoneConverter.meetingDescription: Enter a meeting time in your local timezone and convert it across all selected zones.
toolTimezoneConverter.meetingPlaceholder: Choose a meeting time and the converted times will appear here automatically.
toolTimezoneConverter.compareLimit: You can compare up to 5 timezones at once.
toolTimezoneConverter.footerNote: Useful for cross-timezone meetings, remote collaboration, and travel planning.
